articles.title: Dutch Authorities Confirm Ivanti Zero-Day Exploit Exposed Employee Contact Data
articles.summary: The Netherlands' Dutch Data Protection Authority (AP) and the Council for the Judiciary confirmed both agencies (Rvdr) have disclosed that their systems were impacted by cyber attacks that exploited the recently disclosed security flaws in Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM), according to a notice sent to the country's parliament on Friday.  "On January 29, the National Cyber Security Center (NCSC) was informed by the supplier of vulnerabilities in EPMM," the Dutch authorities said . "EPMM is used to manage mobile devices, apps, and content, including their security."  "It is now known that work-related data of AP employees, such as names, business email addresses, and telephone numbers, have been accessed by unauthorized persons."   The development comes as the European Commission also revealed that its central infrastructure managing mobile devices "identified traces" of a cyber attack that may have resulted in access to names and mo...
articles.title_fr: Les autorités néerlandaises confirment qu'un exploit zero-day Ivanti a exposé les données de contact des employés
articles.summary_fr: L'Autorité néerlandaise de protection des données (AP) et le Conseil de la magistrature (Rvdr) ont confirmé que leurs systèmes ont été touchés par des cyberattaques exploitant des failles de sécurité récemment divulguées dans Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM). Ces attaques ont permis un accès non autorisé aux données professionnelles des employés de l'AP, telles que leurs noms, adresses e-mail professionnelles et numéros de téléphone. La Commission européenne a également détecté des traces d'une attaque similaire sur son infrastructure de gestion des appareils mobiles.

articles.title: Fortinet Patches Critical SQLi Flaw Enabling Unauthenticated Code Execution
articles.summary: Fortinet has released security updates to address a critical flaw impacting FortiClientEMS that could lead to the execution of arbitrary code on susceptible systems.  The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-21643 , has a CVSS rating of 9.1 out of a maximum of 10.0.   "An improper neutralization of special elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability [CWE-89] in FortiClientEMS may allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via specifically crafted HTTP requests," Fortinet said  in an advisory.  The shortcoming affects the following versions -   FortiClientEMS 7.2 (Not affected)  FortiClientEMS 7.4.4 (Upgrade to 7.4.5 or above)  FortiClientEMS 8.0 (Not affected)    Gwendal Guégniaud of the Fortinet Product Security team has been credited with discovering and reporting the flaw.  While Fortinet makes no mention of the vulnerability being exploited in the wild, it's essential that users move quickly to apply the fixes...
articles.title_fr: Fortinet corrige une faille critique d'injection SQL permettant l'exécution de code non authentifiée
articles.summary_fr: Fortinet a publié des mises à jour de sécurité pour corriger une faille critique (CVE-2026-21643) dans FortiClientEMS, permettant l'exécution de code arbitraire sur les systèmes vulnérables. Cette vulnérabilité d'injection SQL, notée 9.1 sur 10, permet à un attaquant non authentifié d'exécuter des commandes via des requêtes HTTP spécifiquement conçues. Les utilisateurs des versions affectées, notamment FortiClientEMS 7.4.4, sont fortement encouragés à appliquer les correctifs sans tarder.

articles.title: China-Linked UNC3886 Targets Singapore Telecom Sector in Cyber Espionage Campaign
articles.summary: The Cyber Security Agency (CSA) of Singapore on Monday revealed that the China-nexus cyber espionage group known as UNC3886  targeted its telecommunications sector.  "UNC3886 had launched a deliberate, targeted, and well-planned campaign against Singapore's telecommunications sector," CSA said . "All four of Singapore's major telecommunications operators ('telcos') – M1, SIMBA Telecom, Singtel, and StarHub – have been the target of attacks."  The development comes more than six months after Singapore's Coordinating Minister for National Security, K. Shanmugam, accused  UNC3886 of striking high-value strategic threat targets. UNC3886 is assessed to be active since at least 2022, targeting edge devices and virtualization technologies to obtain initial access.   In July 2025, Sygnia disclosed  details of a long-term cyber espionage campaign attributed to a threat cluster it tracks as Fire Ant and which shares tooling and targeting overlaps with UNC...
articles.title_fr: Le groupe UNC3886, lié à la Chine, cible le secteur des télécommunications de Singapour dans une campagne de cyberespionnage
articles.summary_fr: L'Agence de cybersécurité (CSA) de Singapour a révélé que le groupe de cyberespionnage UNC3886, lié à la Chine, a ciblé son secteur des télécommunications. Les quatre principaux opérateurs de télécommunications de Singapour ont été visés par cette campagne délibérée et bien planifiée. Actif depuis au moins 2022, UNC3886 se concentre sur les dispositifs périphériques et les technologies de virtualisation pour obtenir un accès initial.
